items.title: Bitcoin dips to $72K on hot US PPI inflation hours before Fed FOMC meeting
items.summary: Bitcoin price action fell to week-to-date lows with Bitcoin caught between high US inflation and nerves over Fed policy hints at the day's FOMC meeting.
items.title_cn: 美联储FOMC会议前数小时，美国PPI通胀数据火热，比特币跌至7.2万美元
items.summary_cn: 比特币价格跌至本周低点，因美国高通胀与美联储在当日FOMC会议上可能释放的政策信号引发市场紧张情绪。

items.title: Bitcoin stalls at $76K: Key BTC price levels to watch ahead of FOMC
items.summary: Bitcoin price traded at $74,000 as investors braced for Jerome Powell’s post-FOMC speech that could see volatile swings toward key BTC price levels.
items.title_cn: 比特币停滞在7.6万美元：FOMC会议前需关注的关键BTC价格水平
items.summary_cn: 比特币交易价格为7.4万美元，投资者正为杰罗姆·鲍威尔在FOMC会议后的讲话做准备，这可能引发比特币价格向关键水平剧烈波动。

items.title: Bitcoin ETF inflow streak nears October run, but totals still lag
items.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs draw $1.2 billion over seven days, far short of October 2025’s nine-day $6 billion streak, as XRP ETFs turn green.
items.title_cn: 比特币ETF资金流入连续天数接近10月纪录，但总额仍落后
items.summary_cn: 美国现货比特币ETF在七天内吸引12亿美元资金，远低于2025年10月连续九天60亿美元的纪录，而XRP ETF已转为净流入。

items.title: Bitcoin inflows to exchanges spike as BTC hits resistance at $75K
items.summary: Spikes in large deposits to exchanges have been associated with increased selling pressure, according to analysts at CryptoQuant.
items.title_cn: 比特币在7.5万美元遇阻，交易所流入量激增
items.summary_cn: CryptoQuant分析师指出，交易所大额存款激增通常与抛售压力增加相关。

items.title: Bitcoin holds $70K, bringing spot ETF buyers close to breakeven: Is the bull market back?
items.summary: A Bitcoin price rally to $80,000 would bring the bulk of spot BTC ETF holders to breakeven on their positions and possibly signal the resumption of the crypto bull market.
items.title_cn: 比特币守住7万美元关口，现货ETF买家接近盈亏平衡：牛市回归了吗？
items.summary_cn: 若比特币价格反弹至8万美元，将使大部分现货BTC ETF持有者达到盈亏平衡点，并可能预示着加密货币牛市的恢复。

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
items.title_cn: 今日加密货币市场动态汇总
items.summary_cn: 需要了解今日加密货币市场发生了什么吗？以下是关于影响比特币价格、区块链、DeFi、NFT、Web3和加密货币监管的每日趋势和事件的最新消息。

items.title: Ethereum aims to cut bridge times by 98% to 13 seconds with new rule
items.summary: Ethereum’s FCR aims to reduce bridge times by up to 98%, bringing L1-to-L2 and exchange deposits down to 13 seconds without a hard fork.
items.title_cn: 以太坊新规旨在将跨链桥时间缩短98%至13秒
items.summary_cn: 以太坊的FCR目标是将跨链桥时间缩短高达98%，将L1到L2和交易所存款时间降至13秒，且无需硬分叉。

items.title: Vitalik Buterin promotes an update simplifying Ethereum node software
items.summary: The blockchain co-founder said the goal is to make the "self-sovereign" method of Ethereum users running their own nodes a user-friendly experience.
items.title_cn: Vitalik Buterin推广简化以太坊节点软件的更新
items.summary_cn: 这位区块链联合创始人表示，目标是让以太坊用户运行自己节点的“自托管”方法成为一种用户友好的体验。

items.title: Bitmine speeds pace of Ethereum buys, boosting treasury to 4.6M ETH
items.summary: About two-thirds of the company’s tokens are currently staked, generating an estimated $180 million in annualized revenue.
items.title_cn: Bitmine加速购买以太坊，将国库储备提升至460万ETH
items.summary_cn: 该公司约三分之二的代币目前处于质押状态，预计年化收入达1.8亿美元。

items.title: Three Ethereum indicators hint that $2.8K is the next ETH price target
items.summary: A symmetrical triangle breakout and an unresolved supply overhang are boosting the case that Ether may go as high as $2,800 in March.
items.title_cn: 三个以太坊指标暗示2,800美元是下一个ETH价格目标
items.summary_cn: 对称三角形突破和未解决的供应过剩正在增强以太币可能在3月涨至2,800美元的预期。

items.title: Polymarket Doubles Down on Growth With DC Bar Launch and Brahma DeFi Deal
items.summary: Polymarket is doubling down on its real-time prediction identity with a Washington, D.C., bar launch and a fresh DeFi acquisition, even as scrutiny from U.S. lawmakers intensifies. Polymarket’s D.C. Bar Debut and Brahma Deal Signal Aggressive Growth Polymarket has unveiled “The Situation Room,” a Washington, D.C.-based bar designed around live monitoring of global events, while […]
items.title_cn: Polymarket通过DC酒吧开业和Brahma DeFi交易加倍押注增长
items.summary_cn: Polymarket正加倍押注其实时预测身份，在华盛顿特区开设酒吧并进行新的DeFi收购，尽管美国立法者的审查日益加强。Polymarket的DC酒吧首秀和Brahma交易标志着其积极扩张。

items.title: 'Crypto Castle': YouTube Comedy Takes You Back to When Bitcoin Was Just $250
items.summary: “The Crypto Castle” takes a look at the early days of Bitcoin—and the "sad evolution" it's undergone since then.
items.title_cn: 《加密货币城堡》：YouTube喜剧带你回到比特币仅250美元的时代
items.summary_cn: 《加密货币城堡》回顾了比特币的早期岁月——以及自那时以来经历的“可悲演变”。

items.title: Report: Kraken Pauses Public Listing Plans, Eyes Better Market Conditions
items.summary: Crypto exchange Kraken has paused its planned initial public offering as softer market conditions weigh on timing, even as the company keeps the option open for a future listing. “People familiar with the matter” told Coindesk that Kraken’s IPO ambitions remain intact but are likely delayed until market conditions improve, following a period of declining […]
items.title_cn: 报道：Kraken暂停公开上市计划，等待更佳市场条件
items.summary_cn: 加密货币交易所Kraken已暂停其计划的首次公开募股，因市场条件疲软影响时机，尽管公司仍保留未来上市的选择。知情人士告诉Coindesk，Kraken的IPO雄心依然存在，但可能推迟至市场条件改善。

items.title: Bitcoin Breaks Lower Range as Pressure Builds Beneath $71K
items.summary: Bitcoin traded below $71,000 on March 18, 2026, after dropping to an intraday low of $70,767 just before 11 a.m. EST, within a broader $70,767 to $74,836 range. The move places price directly on a critical support zone, with technical signals increasingly strained across shorter timeframes. Bitcoin Chart Outlook Price action now reflects a deeper […]
items.title_cn: 比特币跌破下方区间，7.1万美元下方压力积聚
items.summary_cn: 2026年3月18日，比特币跌破7.1万美元，在东部时间上午11点前触及日内低点70,767美元，处于70,767至74,836美元的更广泛区间内。此举使价格直接处于关键支撑区域，短期时间框架内的技术信号日益紧张。

items.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Slip on Inflation Surprise as Oil Prices Jump
items.summary: Bitcoin fell alongside U.S. stocks after the world's largest gas field came under attack amid hotter-than-expected inflation data.
items.title_cn: 通胀意外与油价跳涨，比特币和以太坊双双下跌
items.summary_cn: 在全球最大天然气田遇袭以及通胀数据超预期的背景下，比特币随美国股市一同下跌。

items.title: Hyperliquid Lists First Official S&P 500 Perpetual
items.summary: The S&P 500 has entered the world of decentralized finance with the launch of its first perpetual contract on Hyperliquid. The move signals a major step toward round-the-clock access to traditional financial benchmarks. S&P 500 Enters 24/7 Trading Era With Onchain Perpetual Launch In a landmark moment for the convergence of traditional finance and crypto […]
items.title_cn: Hyperliquid上线首个官方标普500永续合约
items.summary_cn: 标普500指数已进入去中心化金融世界，在Hyperliquid上推出了首个永续合约。此举标志着向全天候访问传统金融基准迈出了重要一步。标普500指数通过链上永续合约开启24/7交易时代。

items.title: Bank of Korea Expands Digital Won Pilot With Phase 2 Launch and Two New Banks
items.summary: The Bank of Korea has launched Phase 2 of its Project Hangang central bank digital currency pilot, expanding real-world testing of the digital won with broader banking participation and new programmable payment features. Korea Explores CBDC- Stablecoin Hybrid Model in Project Hangang Expansion The March 18 announcement marks a renewed push by the Bank of […]
items.title_cn: 韩国央行扩大数字韩元试点，启动第二阶段并新增两家银行
items.summary_cn: 韩国央行已启动其汉江项目央行数字货币试点的第二阶段，通过更广泛的银行参与和新的可编程支付功能，扩大数字韩元的现实世界测试。韩国在汉江项目扩展中探索CBDC-稳定币混合模型。

items.title: Canadian Regulator Revokes Registrations of 23 Crypto Firms
items.summary: Canada's FINTRAC pulled the licenses of multiple money services businesses, in a "significantly increased pace of action."
items.title_cn: 加拿大监管机构撤销23家加密货币公司的注册
items.summary_cn: 加拿大FINTRAC撤销了多家货币服务企业的牌照，这标志着“行动步伐显著加快”。

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs' $1.2B Streak Hangs in Balance as FOMC Takes Center Stage
items.summary: Experts warn that Bitcoin ETF inflows remain "episodic" without policy shifts, ahead of today's FOMC meeting.

items.title: Morning Minute: The SEC & CFTC Declare 'Most Crypto Assets' Are Not Securities
items.summary: After a decade of lawsuits, the SEC and CFTC finally wrote the rules for digital assets.

items.title: Expectations for the next Fed rate cut get pushed back after hot inflation report
items.summary: Futures markets took any realistic chance of a cut off the table until at least December.

items.title: As Americans struggle with rising costs, many states’ unemployment benefits fall short, analysis finds
items.summary: The U.S. unemployment system is not prepared for a recession, with some states having failed to raise their maximum weekly benefit in decades, experts say.

items.title: Meta is shutting down VR social platform Horizon Worlds in further pivot away from the metaverse
items.summary: Meta is scaling back its metaverse focus, cutting studios and headcount at Reality Labs to prioritize artificial intelligence.

items.title: Fed to still cut rates this year, even as high oil prices spark an uptick in inflation: CNBC Fed Survey
items.summary: The 32 respondents, including fund managers, analysts and economists, see oil prices on average at $88 a barrel six months from now.

items.title: Mortgage refinance demand plunges 19% after interest rates shoot higher
items.summary: Mortgage rates shot higher last week, as the war with Iran stoked fears over inflation. That caused a major drop in refinance demand, but buyer demand improved.

items.title: Lululemon reports weak guidance as proxy battle, tariffs weigh on bottom line
items.summary: Lululemon topped fourth-quarter estimates but gave weaker-than-expected sales and earnings forecasts for 2026.

items.title: Elon Musk and SEC in talks to settle lawsuit over Twitter deal
items.summary: The SEC accused Elon Musk of failing to promptly disclose that he amassed an active stake in Twitter in 2022.

items.title: Iran war, oil price surge worsen K-shaped economy, say economists
items.summary: Rising oil prices and the fallout of the Iran war are worsening the economic divide, experts say.

items.title: The Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday. Here's what to expect
items.summary: The Federal Reserve has little choice but to stay on the sidelines this week.

ai_summary.en:
**🌍 Global Macro & Liquidity**: Macro environment shows mixed signals with restrictive Fed expectations (3.64% implied rate, 'Restrictive' zone) and fear in crypto markets (BTC Fear & Greed: 26). However, Yen weakness (159.498, +0.88% 5d) suggests some risk-on appetite, supported by falling yields (US10Y: 4.23, -1.05% 5d) and subsiding fear (VIX: 23.2, -14.99% 5d). News narratives are cautious with delayed Fed cuts and mixed crypto developments (Polymarket growth vs Kraken pausing listings).

**🟠 BTC Strategy (Contract Only)**:
* **Signal**: PROBE
* **Reality Check**: BTC shows oversold conditions (RSI: 38.8, Price Rank: 7.3/100) with high long liquidations ($19.9M vs $1.1M short). Positive funding (0.000014) and OI delta (+4.60%) suggest some accumulation. Lower wick exhaustion (11.4%) indicates buying pressure at lows. The ADX (38.3) shows a strong downtrend, but oversold RSI and liquidation pain suggest potential bounce.

**🔷 ETH Strategy**:
* **Signal**: OBSERVE
* **Reality Check**: Whale reality shows negative sentiment (-0.0) with significant net outflows (-3.6M tokens, -$18.1M stablecoins), contradicting positive ETH news (bridge improvements, node updates). Technicals show strong downtrend (ADX: 44.2) with bearish MACD (-20.2813). High long liquidations ($14.0M) indicate retail pain, but lower wick exhaustion (12.9%) shows some absorption. 7-day trend (declining from 2349 to 2178) aligns with immediate bearish signals.
* **Key Metric**: Negative whale net flows (-3.6M tokens) despite positive news - suggests distribution.

**🟣 SOL Strategy**:
* **Signal**: WAIT
* **Reality Check**: Whale sentiment is negative (-0.1) with mixed flows (+170K tokens but -$177K stablecoins). Technicals show weak momentum (RSI: 39.3, MACD: -0.7687) with high long liquidations ($3.6M vs $68K short). Lower wick exhaustion (23.3%) indicates buying at lows, but ADX (35.5) shows moderate downtrend. News is neutral (Polymarket growth). 7-day trend (declining from 95.59 to 88.84) confirms bearish structure.
* **Key Metric**: High lower wick exhaustion (23.3%) suggests accumulation at current levels.

**BNB Context**: Price Rank extremely low (1.6/100) with oversold RSI (34.4) and high long liquidations ($183K). Lower wick exhaustion (18.2%) and negative funding (-0.000182) suggest potential squeeze. Signal: PROBE.

**DOGE Context**: Extremely oversold (Price Rank: 1.3/100) with high long liquidations ($3.5M) and significant lower wick exhaustion (30.6%). Negative funding (-0.000045) adds to squeeze potential. Signal: PROBE.
ai_summary.zh:
**🌍 全球宏观与流动性**: 宏观环境显示混合信号，美联储预期紧缩（隐含利率3.64%，'限制性'区间），加密市场恐惧（BTC恐惧贪婪指数：26）。然而，日元疲软（159.498，5日+0.88%）显示一定风险偏好，美债收益率下降（US10Y：4.23，5日-1.05%）和恐慌指数回落（VIX：23.2，5日-14.99%）提供支撑。新闻叙事谨慎，美联储降息推迟，加密消息好坏参半（Polymarket增长 vs Kraken暂停上市）。

**🟠 BTC策略（仅合约）**:
* **信号**: 试探
* **现实检查**: BTC显示超卖状态（RSI：38.8，价格排名：7.3/100），多头清算高（$1990万 vs $106万空头）。正资金费率（0.000014）和持仓量变化（+4.60%）显示积累迹象。下影线耗尽（11.4%）表明低点买盘。ADX（38.3）显示强劲下跌趋势，但超卖RSI和清算痛苦暗示可能反弹。

**🔷 ETH策略**:
* **信号**: 观察
* **现实检查**: 鲸鱼现实显示负面情绪（-0.0），显著净流出（-360万代币，-$1810万稳定币），与正面ETH新闻（跨链改进、节点更新）矛盾。技术面显示强劲下跌趋势（ADX：44.2），MACD看跌（-20.2813）。高多头清算（$1400万）显示散户痛苦，但下影线耗尽（12.9%）显示吸收。7日趋势（从2349跌至2178）与即时看跌信号一致。
* **关键指标**: 尽管新闻正面，鲸鱼净流出负（-360万代币）——暗示派发。

**🟣 SOL策略**:
* **信号**: 等待
* **现实检查**: 鲸鱼情绪负面（-0.1），资金流混合（+17万代币但-$17.7万稳定币）。技术面显示动能疲弱（RSI：39.3，MACD：-0.7687），多头清算高（$358万 vs $6.8万空头）。下影线耗尽（23.3%）表明低点买盘，但ADX（35.5）显示中度下跌趋势。新闻中性（Polymarket增长）。7日趋势（从95.59跌至88.84）确认看跌结构。
* **关键指标**: 高下影线耗尽（23.3%）暗示当前价位积累。

**BNB背景**: 价格排名极低（1.6/100），RSI超卖（34.4），多头清算高（$18.3万）。下影线耗尽（18.2%）和负资金费率（-0.000182）暗示潜在轧空。信号：试探。

**DOGE背景**: 极度超卖（价格排名：1.3/100），多头清算高（$346万），下影线耗尽显著（30.6%）。负资金费率（-0.000045）增加轧空潜力。信号：试探。
